scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @ocr/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @ocr/web
scripts.test:web: node --test --experimental-strip-types apps/web/tests/training-dataset.test.ts apps/web/tests/pii.test.ts apps/web/tests/tenant-processing.test.ts apps/web/tests/routing-benchmark.test.ts apps/web/tests/ocr-cost.test.ts apps/web/tests/ops-insights.test.ts apps/web/tests/runtime-flags.test.ts apps/web/tests/public-api-auth.test.ts apps/web/tests/public-api-security.test.ts apps/web/tests/public-api-analytics.test.ts apps/web/tests/public-trial.test.ts
scripts.test: npm run test:web && npm run test:python
